---
name: Feature Request
about: Feature or Enhancement Request
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: 'enhancement'
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement
<!-- Clear and concise description of the feature and it's capabilities. -->
<!-- What does this feature address or solve? -->


## Proposed Solution
<!-- Clear and concise description of what you want to happen. -->
<!-- Describe the solution you'd like and how it addresses the problem. -->

### Alternatives Considered
<!-- Clear and concise description of alternatives or features you have considered. -->

## Impact
<!-- Who will benefit from this feature and how? (e.g., Users or developers) -->

## Approach
<!-- If you have ideas about how to implement this feature, describe them here. -->
<!-- This could include technical details, architectural changes, or specific APIs. -->

## Additional
<!-- If applicable, add mockups or references to similar. -->
<!-- Add any other context, use cases, scripts or screenshots. -->
